display.purpose: Page heroes and major section titles only.

motion.name: color-transition
motion.value: color 150ms ease, background-color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease
motion.purpose: Default hover on buttons, links, nav.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; background: #172E28; color: #ffffff; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(23, 46, 40, 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: rgba(23, 46, 40, 0.5); cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Tertiary Button
components.description: Secondary navigation actions with optional arrow.
components.css: .ds-btn-tertiary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; background: transparent; color: #172E28; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-tertiary:hover { color: #5D6D69; } .ds-btn-arrow { margin-left: 8px; transition: transform 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-tertiary:hover .ds-btn-arrow { transform: translateX(4px); }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Default text input and textarea styling.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 8px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: #172E28; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #E8EBEA; border-radius: 8px; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5D6D69; opacity: 0.7; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #5D6D69; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Active registry filter pill with dismiss.
components.html: Edition 1991 SE
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #172E28; color: #E8EBEA; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 4px 0 4px 12px; border-radius: 6px; } .ds-chip-label { color: rgba(232, 235, 234, 0.6); } .ds-chip-dismiss { background: none; border: none; color: inherit; padding: 4px 12px 4px 0; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-chip-dismiss:hover { color: #fca5a5; }

components.name: Edition Card
components.description: Edition browse card with image and hover wash.
components.html: 1991 Special Edition
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #E8EBEA; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { background: rgba(232, 235, 234, 0.25); } .ds-card-media { aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; background: #E8EBEA; } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; color: #172E28; margin: 0; }

components.name: Header Nav Link
components.description: Top-level navigation item default and hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #5D6D69; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link.is-active { color: #172E28; font-weight: 500; }

narrative.overview: Miata Registry looks like a careful enthusiast institution: muted British-racing-green tones, Inter at readable sizes, soft corners, and borders instead of dramatic shadows. Density is moderate — registry tables and car profiles need room for data; marketing moments on the home page still use the same vocabulary. The system rejects startup gloss and AI-slop tells.
keyCharacteristics: brg token palette only for UI chrome
rounded-lg (8px) as the default corner language
Primary actions are solid brg fills
Modals and dropdowns are the main elevation exceptions

rules.name: The BRG-Only Rule
rules.body: UI colors come from the brg token set. Do not introduce gray-*, slate-*, or purple/blue accent utilities for chrome.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Green carries the brand; red appears only for destructive/remove affordances.

rules.name: The Inter-Only Rule
rules.body: Do not add a second font family for character. Enthusiasm comes from photography and copy.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: If you're reaching for a shadow, first try a border or tonal background step.

dos: Do use brg, brg-mid, brg-border, brg-light tokens for all UI chrome.
Do keep Inter as the only UI typeface.
Do use rounded-lg for buttons, inputs, cards, and modals unless a pill is intentional.
Do let car photography and registry data dominate visual interest.
Do match existing component APIs before inventing new primitives.
donts: Don't use purple gradients, glassmorphism, neon accents, or floating-orbit hero decorations.
Don't use gray-* / slate-* Tailwind classes for UI surfaces.
Don't add display serifs, gradient text, or oversized fluid type in app screens.
Don't ship inconsistent button styles on different pages.
Don't add decorative motion beyond hover and skeleton states.
Don't call registry cars special editions or models in new copy.
